HGSS.524.0000:
What are Johto’s Pokémon Centers like?\f
...Oh, I see. So they’re not much
different from the ones in Kanto.\f
Then I’ll get my friend in Johto to
catch a MARILL and trade it to me!
HGSS.524.0001:
I just happened to come through the
Rock Tunnel. There was some commotion\r
at the Power Plant.
HGSS.524.0002:
Adventures are not always full of
oceans and mountains!\f
Daily life can be quite adventurous!\f
...By the way, I’ve heard people
talking about a cave in Cerulean.\f
Do you know anything?
HGSS.524.0003:
Silph Co.’s head office and the
Magnet Train station--\r
they’re the places to see in Saffron.
